languages.text: "Твердолобые и прямолинейные? Из этого может получиться крепкий союз. Или кровавая вражда. Любой исход меня устроит".
"Do you mean stubborn and blunt? A strong alliance could come of that. Or a bloody feud. Either outcome suits me."
languages.original_text: "Твердолобые и прямолинейные? Из этого может получиться крепкий союз. Или кровавая вражда. Любой исход меня устроит".

traits.locale_text: "Stubborn and blunt? A strong alliance could come of this. Or a bloody feud. Either outcome suits me."
"Do you mean stubborn and blunt? A strong alliance could come of that. Or a bloody feud. Either outcome suits me."
"Hot-headed, belligerent, and decisive? I suppose that would indeed make for a strong alliance. Or a bloody feud."
"Stubborn and blunt? A strong alliance could come of this. Or a bloody feud. Either outcome suits me."
"Do you mean stubborn and blunt? A strong alliance could come of that. Or a bloody feud. Either outcome suits me."

languages.text: 「短気で、敵意があり、決断力がある？確かに、強固な同盟になるだろう。あるいは、血みどろの敵対関係になるかもしれない」
languages.original_text: "Hot-headed, belligerent, and decisive? I suppose that would indeed make for a strong alliance. Or a bloody feud."

languages.text: "İnatçı ve dobra mı demek istiyorsunuz? Bundan güçlü bir ittifak doğabilir. Ya da kanlı bir kan davası. Her iki sonuç da bana uyar."
languages.original_text: "Do you mean stubborn and blunt? A strong alliance could come of that. Or a bloody feud. Either outcome suits me."

traits.locale_text: "İnatçı ve dobra mı demek istiyorsunuz? Bundan güçlü bir ittifak doğabilir. Ya da kanlı bir kan davası. Her iki sonuç da bana uyar."

languages.text: “您的意思是又犟又冲？这能促成牢固的同盟，也可能引发血仇。不论哪种结果，我都乐见其成。”
languages.original_text: "Do you mean stubborn and blunt? A strong alliance could come of that. Or a bloody feud. Either outcome suits me."

traits.locale_text: “您的意思是又犟又冲？这能促成牢固的同盟，也可能引发血仇。不论哪种结果，我都乐见其成。”

languages.text: "Meint Ihr störrisch und ungehobelt? Daraus könnte eine starke Allianz werden. Oder eine blutige Fehde. Mir ist beides recht."
languages.original_text: "Do you mean stubborn and blunt? A strong alliance could come of that. Or a bloody feud. Either outcome suits me."

traits.locale_text: "Meint Ihr störrisch und ungehobelt? Daraus könnte eine starke Allianz werden. Oder eine blutige Fehde. Mir ist beides recht."

languages.text: « Impulsifs et belliqueux, vous voulez dire ? J'imagine que ça pourrait en effet donner lieu à une alliance des plus solides... Ou à une querelle sanglante. Peu m'importe le résultat. »
languages.original_text: "Do you mean stubborn and blunt? A strong alliance could come of that. Or a bloody feud. Either outcome suits me."

traits.locale_text: « Impulsifs et belliqueux, vous voulez dire ? J'imagine que ça pourrait en effet donner lieu à une alliance des plus solides... Ou à une querelle sanglante. Peu m'importe le résultat. »

languages.text: «¿Quiere decir tozudos y directos? Podríamos tener una buena alianza... o una enemistad sangrienta. Me sirven ambos resultados».
languages.original_text: "Do you mean stubborn and blunt? A strong alliance could come of that. Or a bloody feud. Either outcome suits me."

traits.locale_text: «¿Quiere decir tozudos y directos? Podríamos tener una buena alianza... o una enemistad sangrienta. Me sirven ambos resultados».
